Passive.s: In 1614 the King’s Men Playing Company rebuilt the theatre. In 1614 the theatre ______ the King’s Men Playing Company.
My grandfather built this house in 1960. This house ______ in 1960.
Shakespeare wrote "Hamlet" around 1600. "Hamlet" ______ around 1600.
Alexander Fleming discovered penicillin in 1928. Penicillin ______ in 1928.
The heavy rain caused the flood. The flood ______ the heavy rain.
A famous architect designed this school. This school ______ a famous architect.
Lightning struck the old oak tree. The old oak tree ______ lightning.
J.K. Rowling wrote the Harry Potter books. The Harry Potter books ______ J.K. Rowling.
The police arrested the burglars last night. The burglars ______ last night.
Fire destroyed the forest. The forest ______ fire.
Steven Spielberg directed the movie. The movie ______ Steven Spielberg.
Leonardo da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa. The Mona Lisa ______ Leonardo da Vinci.
A local gardener maintains the park. The park ______ a local gardener.
The teacher corrected our exams yesterday. Our exams ______ yesterday.
Thomas Edison invented the light bulb. The light bulb ______ Thomas Edison.
The cat killed the mouse. The mouse ______ the cat.
A car hit the dog. The dog ______ a car.
Many people speak English all over the world. English ______ many people.
The company employs five hundred people. Five hundred people ______ the company.
The storm damaged the roof. The roof ______ the storm.
Christopher Columbus discovered America. America ______ Christopher Columbus.
The chef prepares the food fresh. The food ______ fresh.
An expert will check your car. Your car ______ an expert.
A famous singer sang the anthem. The anthem ______ a famous singer.
Millions of tourists visit Munich. Munich ______ millions of tourists.
The government changed the law. The law ______ the government.
A professional photographer took the picture. The picture ______ a professional photographer.
The gardener waters the plants every day. The plants ______ every day.
My sister cleaned the kitchen. The kitchen ______ my sister.
The principal opened the new library. The new library ______ the principal.

Reported Speech.s: "I am tired," said Mark. Mark said ______ tired.
"We are going to the cinema," they told us. They told us they ______ to the cinema.
"I have lost my keys," she explained. She explained that she ______ her keys.
"I will call you tomorrow," said Tom. Tom said he ______ the next day.
"Stop talking!" the teacher said to us. The teacher ______ talking.
"Do you like pizza?" he asked me. He asked me ______ pizza.
"Where is the station?" she asked. She asked where the station ______.
"I can't swim," said Sarah. Sarah said she ______.
"Don't open the window!" my mum said. My mum told me ______ the window.
"I saw a great film yesterday," he said. He said he had seen a great film ______.
"I'm living in London now," said Jane. Jane said she ______ in London then.
"Have you finished your homework?" he asked. He asked me if I ______ my homework.
"We must leave at once," they said. They said they ______ at once.
"I'll help you with that," said Dad. Dad said he ______ me with that.
"I visited Paris last year," she said. She said she ______ Paris the year before.
"Are you coming to the party?" they asked me. They asked me if ______ to the party.
"Please sit down," the doctor said. The doctor ______ sit down.
"I don't know the answer," said Peter. Peter said he ______ the answer.
"We will be late," he warned. He warned us that we ______ late.
"What are you doing?" she asked him. She asked him what ______.
"I've been working hard," he said. He said he ______ hard.
"Can you open the door, please?" she asked. She asked me ______ the door.
"I'm not going to tell you," he said. He said he ______ tell me.
"We bought a new car," they told us. They told us they ______ a new car.
"Stay in bed," the doctor told him. The doctor told him ______ in bed.
"Where did you go?" she asked. She asked me where ______.
"I'll see you here tomorrow," he said. He said he would see me ______ the next day.
"Don't forget your books!" said the teacher. The teacher told us ______ our books.
"I may be late," said Julia. Julia said she ______ late.
"Why are you crying?" he asked. He asked her why ______ crying.

If-clauses.s: The train was late, so I missed the meeting. I ______ the meeting if the train had been on time.
She didn't know the answer, so she didn't pass. If she ______ the answer, she would have passed.
I don't have his number, so I can't call him. If I ______ , I would call him.
We didn't see the sign, so we took the wrong turn. We ______ the wrong turn if we had seen the sign.
He doesn't feel well, so he won't come. ______ well, he wouldn't come.
The weather was bad, so they stayed inside. They ______ inside if the weather had been good.
I am not hungry, so I won't eat. I ______ eat unless I were hungry.
You didn't ask me, so I didn't help you. If you ______ me, I would have helped you.
The shops are closed, so we can't buy milk. If the shops ______, we could buy milk.
He arrived late, so he didn't see the start. He ______ the start if he had arrived earlier.
She isn't here, so she doesn't know. If she ______, she would know.
It rained, so we didn't play tennis. We ______ tennis if it hadn't rained.
I don't speak Spanish, so I can't understand. ______ Spanish, I could understand.
They didn't listen, so they made a mistake. If they ______ they wouldn't have made a mistake.
You don't try, so you don't succeed. You ______ succeed unless you try.
The water was too cold to swim in. We ______ in the water if it had been warmer.
He forgot the keys, so he couldn't enter. If he ______ the keys, he could have entered.
I am too tired to go out. If I ______ so tired, I would go out.
She didn't study hard, so she failed. She ______ if she had studied hard.
We didn't have a map, so we got lost. We ______ if we had had a map.
I'll go only if you come with me. I ______ unless you come with me.
The soup was too salty, so he didn't eat it. He ______ the soup if it hadn't been so salty.
He doesn't like fish, so he didn't order it. If he ______ fish, he would have ordered it.
The film was boring, so we left. We ______ if the film hadn't been boring.
I didn't see the light, so I didn't stop. If I ______ the light, I would have stopped.
It is very cold, so I am wearing a coat. I ______ a coat unless it was very cold.
They didn't win because they didn't play well. They ______ if they had played well.
I can't help you because I don't know the way. ______ the way, I would help you.
She was ill, so she missed the party. She ______ the party if she hadn't been ill.
You don't exercise, so you aren't fit. If you ______ you would be fit.

Modals and Substitutes.s: With a solid knowledge of geography you will be good at identifying areas. A solid knowledge ______ identify areas of healthy water.
Specialists can tell from the rock where the water comes from. Specialists ______ from the rock where the water comes from.
Although designers tried hard, modern extras were a necessity to have. Although designers tried hard, ______ modern extras like fire exits.
I'm sure that Shakespeare didn't write this play himself. Shakespeare ______ this play himself.
It was possible for the middle classes to invest in decor for the first time. The middle classes ______ in decor for the first time.
Doctors said they would manage to cure patients with shocks. Doctors said they ______ patients with shocks.
You ought to try some spring water from this area. It ______ some spring water from this area.
Perhaps the Globe Theatre burnt down because of a cannon. The Globe Theatre ______ down because of a cannon.
It is vital that we recognize the reasons for deforestation. We ______ the reasons for deforestation.
I am certain that the Puritans didn't like the entertainment. The Puritans ______ the entertainment.
Is it allowed to take photos inside the theatre? ______ to take photos inside the theatre?
It wasn't necessary for them to rebuild the theatre so quickly. They ______ the theatre so quickly.
I managed to find the original design of the building. I ______ the original design of the building.
There is a possibility that the rain forests will disappear. The rain forests ______ altogether.
It is your duty to preserve the environment. You ______ the environment.
I'm sure the builders used old techniques for the roof. The builders ______ old techniques for the roof.
It was impossible for the actors to perform during the plague. The actors ______ during the plague.
You are not allowed to enter the stage area. Entry to the stage area ______.
We were forced to leave the building because of the fire. We ______ the building because of the fire.
It's a pity you didn't see the play. You ______ the play.
He could speak five languages fluently. He ______ five languages fluently.
There was no need for you to bring an umbrella. You ______ an umbrella.
I'm sure the King didn't enjoy the play. The King ______ the play.
It is essential that visitors follow the safety rules. Visitors ______ the safety rules.
Maybe they didn't understand the instructions. They ______ the instructions.
You shouldn't have ignored the warning signs. You ______ the warning signs.
Was he able to complete the reconstruction on time? Did ______ the reconstruction on time?
I am sure that the fire started in the kitchen. The fire ______ in the kitchen.
You are not required to pay for the tickets in advance. You ______ for the tickets in advance.
It is likely that the weather will improve tomorrow. The weather ______ tomorrow.

Ing-Form and to-infinitive.s: It is a waste of time to wait for him any longer. It ______ for him any longer.
Although he was injured, he finished the race. ______ , he finished the race.
I am excited about meeting your parents tomorrow. I ______ your parents tomorrow.
She didn't buy the dress because it was too expensive. She ______ the expensive dress.
It is possible that he forgot our appointment. He ______ our appointment.
"I'm sorry I'm late," he said. He ______ late.
I really want to see that new film. That new film is ______ to see.
Even though she was tired, she kept working. ______ , she kept working.
I can't wait to go on holiday next week. I am ______ on holiday next week.
He didn't go to the party; he stayed at home instead. ______ to the party, he stayed at home.
Is it okay if I open the window? Do ______ the window?
I'm sure she didn't see me. She ______ me.
It's no use crying over spilt milk. It ______ over spilt milk.
Although the weather was bad, they went for a walk. ______ , they went walking.
I'm really happy that I'll see you soon. I am ______ you soon.
He didn't say goodbye; he just left the room. ______ he just left the room.
I'm interested in finding out more about this topic. It ______ more about this topic.
Maybe they missed the train. They ______ the train.
This book is so good you must read it. This book is ______ .
Even though he had no money, he was happy. ______ , he was happy.
I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon. I ______ from you soon.
He didn't call me; he sent a text message instead. ______ me, he sent a text message.
I don't like it when people shout at me. I ______ at me.
It is certain that he stole the money. He ______ the money.
It is a good idea to visit the museum. The museum is ______ .
People say that the mysterious house is haunted. The mysterious house ______ haunted.
I am excited about starting my new job. I am ______ my new job.
She didn't eat the cake because she was on a diet. She ______ the cake.
I'm sure they were at home last night. They ______ at home last night.
It's a waste of money to buy this car. This car is ______ .

Comparison of adjectives.s: No other student in the school is as tall as Tim. Tim is ______ in the school.
I have never seen a more boring film than this one. This is ______ I have ever seen.
Driving a car is more expensive than riding a bike. Riding a bike is ______ than driving a car.
My new smartphone is not as fast as my old one. My old smartphone ______ my new one.
This exercise is easier than the last one we did. The last exercise ______ this new one.
I didn't expect the test to be so difficult. The test was ______ I had expected.
Silver is expensive, but gold is even more expensive. Silver is ______ gold.
This is the best cake I have ever tasted. I have ______ good cake before.
No one in the team plays better than Sarah. Sarah is ______ in the team.
The weather today is worse than it was yesterday. The weather yesterday was ______ it is today.
A bus is not as fast as a train. A train is ______ a bus.
This book is more interesting than any other in the library. This is ______ in the library.
I've never seen such a beautiful sunset. This is ______ I have ever seen.
Learning English is easier than learning Chinese. Learning Chinese is ______ learning English.
My brother is slightly older than me. I am ______ my brother.
The blue car is cheaper than the red one. The red car is ______ the blue one.
I thought the play would be better. The play was ______ I had thought.
This is the least expensive watch in the shop. All the other watches in the shop ______ this one.
He is the most talented singer I know. I don't know a singer who ______ him.
Your room is tidier than mine. My room is ______ yours.
This summer was hotter than any other before. This was ______ we have ever had.
Planes are faster than ships. Ships are ______ .
He doesn't work as hard as his sister. His sister works ______ .
This suitcase is very heavy; I can't lift it. This suitcase is ______  to lift.
The film wasn't as exciting as the book. The book was ______ the film was.
Mount Everest is the highest mountain in the world. No other mountain ______ Mount Everest.
The pizza was not large enough for three people. The pizza was ______ .
She is the most intelligent person I've ever met. I have ______ an intelligent person.
My sister is as tall as my mother now. My mother is ______ sister.
The journey took longer than we had planned. The journey was ______ we had planned.

Special structures.s: He doesn't like coffee, and he doesn't like tea either. He likes ______ tea.
I last saw him three years ago. I ______ three years.
It was a very beautiful day, so we went out. It was ______ that we went out.
People say that he is a very talented artist. He ______ a very talented artist.
You are expected to arrive at 8 o'clock. You ______ at 8 o'clock.
When I was a child, I went swimming every day. I ______ swimming every day as a child.
It's a pity I didn't see the documentary. I ______ the documentary.
She is very happy because she won the prize. She is ______ the prize.
It isn't necessary for you to wait for me. There is ______  you to wait.
I haven't been to London for five years. It's ______ I last went to London.
He was so tired that he fell asleep immediately. He was ______ he fell asleep immediately.
They say that the castle was built in the 12th century. The castle ______ built in the 12th century.
It is prohibited to park your car in front of the gate. You are ______ your car there.
My grandfather always smoked a pipe in the evenings. My grandfather ______ a pipe in the evenings.
I'm sure it was a mistake to sell the house. I ______ the house.
He is very happy about his new job. He ______ his new job.
I've known her for a long time. I ______ 1992.
It was such a loud noise that I couldn't sleep. The noise ______ that I couldn't sleep.
He was expected to call me yesterday, but he didn't. He ______ me yesterday.
There was no swimming pool here in the past. There ______ a swimming pool here.
I really want to go to the concert tonight. I ______ the concert tonight.
Neither my brother nor my sister can drive. My brother can't drive and ______ .
I haven't eaten anything since breakfast. The last time ______ at breakfast.
It was a very boring book, so I didn't finish it. It was ______ that I didn't finish it.
People believe that she is living abroad. She ______ living abroad.
You shouldn't be here at this time. You ______ here now.
Did you have a habit of biting your nails? ______ bite your nails?
It is too cold to go for a swim today. It isn't ______ for a swim.
He is not a doctor, and his father isn't one either. Neither he ______ is a doctor.
It's been two months since it last rained. It ______ two months.
